ddt:Target.Name: WCBS4_v0.4
ddt:Target.Description:
**** HISTORY ****
v0.1 10/06/2021 : Creation of Database with respect to 210416_RF17_Diagnostic_REssources_C1A-HS-EVO
v0.2 24/01/2022 Added New Vehicle projects: x1316,xBG,xHN,xJB,xJBPh2 .
V0.3 16/02/2022 Venkata -Added new value in $2003. -Added DID's $F0D0 and F0D1.
V0.4 23/08/2022 Venkata Added New vehicle projects: xHNph2,xCBph2, Updated as per the latest 220718_RF17_Diagnostic_Resources_C1A-HS-EVO_1.8_RTK 07-09-2022 Venkata Added New vehicle projects: DZ110 / X1316A / X1317 Updated as per the latest 220726_RF17_Diagnostic_Resources_C1A-HS-EVO_1.9_20220722. 14-09-2022 Venkata Removed vehicle projects: XCB, XHN as per the Alexandra MONU request.

Data.Name: Charging standard and version of receiver
Data.Comment: Charging standard and version of receiver

Data.Name: Power loss between charger and receiver
Data.Comment: Power loss between charger and receiver

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked
lost communication with Body Control Module
lost communication with Hand Free Module
lost communication with Underhood Switching Module
lost communication with Vehicle Dynamic Control

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: Read and write production serial number
Read and write Worker Unique Identifier
Maybe use for get the temperature value 2
Maybe use for get the temperature value 3
FingerPrint
Data.Description: The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Request.Name: DataRead.ID of receivers charging IC
Request.Comment: Read ID of receiver's charging IC

Request.Name: DataRead.Manufacturer of receivers charging IC
Request.Comment: Read Manufacturer of receiver's charging IC

Request.Name: DataRead.Charging standard and version of receiver
Request.Comment: Read Charging standard and version of receiver

DataItem.Name: Charging standard and version of receiver

Request.Name: DataRead.Received power reported by receiver
Request.Comment: Read Received power reported by receiver

Request.Name: DataRead.Power loss between charger and receiver
Request.Comment: Read Power loss between charger and receiver

DataItem.Name: Power loss between charger and receiver

Request.Name: DataRead.stop charing request from HFM
Request.Comment: Read stop charing request from HFM

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Read and write production serial number
Request.Comment: Read and write production serial number

DataItem.Name: Read and write production serial number

Request.Name: DataRead.Maybe use for get the temperature value 2
Request.Comment: Maybe use for get the temperature value 2

DataItem.Name: Maybe use for get the temperature value 2

Request.Name: DataRead.Maybe use for get the temperature value 3
Request.Comment: Maybe use for get the temperature value 3

DataItem.Name: Maybe use for get the temperature value 3

Request.Name: DataRead.Read and write Worker Unique Identifier
Request.Comment: Read and write Worker Unique Identifier

DataItem.Name: Read and write Worker Unique Identifier

Device.Name: lost communication with Body Control Module
lost communication with Hand Free Module
lost communication with Underhood Switching Module
lost communication with Vehicle Dynamic Control

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account
Charging standard and version of receiver
Power loss between charger and receiver

Send.RequestName: DataRead.Charging standard and version of receiver
DataRead.Power loss between charger and receiver

Button.Text: Read ID of receiver's charging IC
Read Manufacturer of receiver's charging IC
Read Charging standard and version of receiver

Send.RequestName: DataRead.Charging standard and version of receiver

Button.Text: Read Received power reported by receiver
Read Power loss between charger and receiver

Send.RequestName: DataRead.Power loss between charger and receiver

Button.Text: Read stop charing request from HFM

Display.DataName: Charging standard and version of receiver
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Charging standard and version of receiver

Display.DataName: Power loss between charger and receiver
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Power loss between charger and receiver

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter

Label.Text: Read and write production serial number
Read and write Worker Unique Identifier
Maybe use for get the temperature value 2
Maybe use for get the temperature value 3

Button.Text: Read Read secure boot activated status
Read and write production serial number
Read and write Worker Unique Identifier
Maybe use for get the temperature value 2
Maybe use for get the temperature value 3

Display.DataName: Read and write production serial number
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Read and write production serial number

Display.DataName: Read and write Worker Unique Identifier
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Read and write Worker Unique Identifier

Display.DataName: Maybe use for get the temperature value 2
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Maybe use for get the temperature value 2

Display.DataName: Maybe use for get the temperature value 3
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Maybe use for get the temperature value 3

Label.Text: By using this request, ECU should be able to start and stop charging
